description_long: This is a modern electric locomotive with a streamlined, angular body painted in a striking combination of red, black, and silver. The exterior features bold geometric patterns and a prominent logo on the side, with visible pantographs on the roof for overhead electric power collection. The train has a series of rectangular windows along its length, and the undercarriage is detailed with wheels, suspension, and mechanical components. Both ends of the locomotive are equipped with headlights and couplers, and the front and rear faces are slightly sloped for aerodynamic efficiency. The surface appears metallic and glossy, with hard, smooth panels and some matte detailing.
description: A modern electric locomotive with a red, black, and silver geometric design, featuring roof pantographs, rectangular windows, and detailed undercarriage components.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the locomotive, geometric paintwork, windows, and roof pantographs.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the sloped nose, headlights, coupler, and the train's width.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the full length, windows, and roof details.
description_view_3: Rear view with a sloped end, headlights, coupler, and visible roof equipment.
